# `/sendshowstoreoffer` Command
Sends a request to show a store offer to the target player.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Owner</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/sendshowstoreoffer <player: target> <redirectType: RedirectLocation> <offerId: string>`

### `/sendshowstoreoffer <player: target> server`

## Arguments
- `offerId`: string
- `player`: target
- `redirectType`: RedirectLocation

## Enums
### `RedirectLocation`

#### Values
- `marketplace`
- `character`
